content: Hey Prasanna! 👋 What are we working on today?
Can you tell about something ai models?

Sure! Here's a quick rundown of the major AI models right now:

---

**🧠 Large Language Models (LLMs)**

- **Claude** (Anthropic) — That's me! Known for reasoning, coding, and long context (200k tokens)
- **GPT-4o** (OpenAI) — Multimodal, fast, widely used
- **Gemini 1.5 Pro** (Google) — Huge context window, strong at analysis
- **Llama 3** (Meta) — Open source, runs locally
- **Mistral** — Lightweight, open source, great for local use

---

**🎨 Image Generation**
- **DALL-E 3** (OpenAI) — High quality, prompt-accurate
- **Midjourney** — Stunning artistic outputs
- **Stable Diffusion** — Open source, very customizable

---

**🏗️ Useful for Your Work (AEC/BIM)**
- **Claude** — Great for pyRevit scripting, code generation
- **Speckle AI** — BIM data analysis
- **Autodesk AI** — Built into Revit/Forma for generative design

---

**📦 Categories to Know**
| Type | Examples |
|------|---------|
| Text/Code | Claude, GPT-4o, Gemini |
| Image | DALL-E, Midjourney |
| 3D/CAD | Point-E, Shap-E |
| Multimodal | GPT-4o, Gemini, Claude |

---

Anything specific you want to dig into? Especially anything that could plug into your Revit or portfolio work? 🚀
